candidate.description: Probabilistic ranking function for full-text search using term frequency saturation, document length normalization, and inverse document frequency.

candidates_full.full_description: Best Match 25 ranking algorithm: probabilistic, parameterized by k1 (term saturation) and b (length normalization). Default scorer in Lucene/Elasticsearch since 5.x.
Classic term-frequency × inverse-document-frequency weighting; precursor to BM25 without saturation or length normalization.
